title: Add UTC timezone offset display to local time in Map Settings

requirements.text: In the WebsiteLayoutPanel component, modify the local time display to append the UTC offset in the format '(UTC +X)' or '(UTC -X)' where X is the timezone offset. For example, 'February 24, 2026 at 9:11 AM (UTC +8)'. Apply this change to the element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/strong[2], which displays the local time for the default search location.

quotes: Under the Map Settings of the Website layout, i want to show what UTC timezone the local time is in

acceptanceCriteria: The local time display includes the UTC offset in parentheses format '(UTC +X)' or '(UTC -X)'
The offset accurately reflects the timezone of the selected default search location
The format matches the example: 'February 24, 2026 at 9:11 AM (UTC +8)'
The change applies only to the specific element identified by the provided XPath

constraints: Do not change the current UI layout
Do not modify the 3D globe component
Only modify the specific element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/strong[2]
All other UI elements must remain unchanged
nonGoals: Redesigning the Map Settings panel layout
Adding timezone offset display to other components or locations
Modifying the 3D globe rendering or interactions
Changing date/time formats beyond adding the UTC offset suffix
